kinesis.short_effect: Lowers the target's accuracy by one stage.

soft-boiled.name: soft-boiled
soft-boiled.flavor_text: The user restores its own HP by up to half its max HP.
soft-boiled.short_effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.

high-jump-kick.name: high-jump-kick
high-jump-kick.flavor_text: The target is attacked with a knee kick from a jump. If this move misses, the user takes damage instead.
high-jump-kick.short_effect: If the user misses, it takes half the damage it would have inflicted in recoil.

glare.name: glare
glare.flavor_text: The user intimidates the target with the pattern on its belly to cause paralysis.

dream-eater.name: dream-eater
dream-eater.flavor_text: The user eats the dreams of a sleeping target. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.
dream-eater.short_effect: Only works on sleeping Pokémon.  Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.

poison-gas.name: poison-gas
poison-gas.flavor_text: A cloud of poison gas is sprayed in the faces of opposing Pokémon, poisoning those it hits.

barrage.name: barrage
barrage.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

leech-life.name: leech-life
leech-life.flavor_text: The user drains the target's blood. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.
leech-life.short_effect: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.

lovely-kiss.name: lovely-kiss
lovely-kiss.flavor_text: With a scary face, the user tries to force a kiss on the target. If it succeeds, the target falls asleep.

sky-attack.name: sky-attack
sky-attack.flavor_text: The user attacks the turn after using this move. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit and may also make the target flinch.
sky-attack.short_effect: User charges for one turn before attacking.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.

transform.name: transform
transform.flavor_text: The user transforms into a copy of the target, right down to having the same move set.
transform.short_effect: User becomes a copy of the target until it leaves battle.

bubble.name: bubble
bubble.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
bubble.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's Speed by one stage.

dizzy-punch.name: dizzy-punch
dizzy-punch.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
dizzy-punch.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to confuse the target.

spore.name: spore
spore.flavor_text: The user scatters bursts of spores that induce sleep.

flash.name: flash
flash.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
flash.short_effect: Lowers the target's accuracy by one stage.

psywave.name: psywave
psywave.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
psywave.short_effect: Inflicts damage between 50% and 150% of the user's level.

splash.name: splash
splash.flavor_text: The user just flops and splashes around to no effect at all...

acid-armor.name: acid-armor
acid-armor.flavor_text: The user alters its cellular structure to liquefy itself, sharply boosting its Defense stat.
acid-armor.short_effect: Raises the user's Defense by two stages.

crabhammer.name: crabhammer
crabhammer.flavor_text: The target is hammered with a large pincer. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.
crabhammer.short_effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

explosion.name: explosion
explosion.flavor_text: The user attacks everything around it by causing a tremendous explosion. The user faints upon using this move.

fury-swipes.name: fury-swipes
fury-swipes.flavor_text: The user attacks by raking the target with claws, scythes, or the like. This move hits two to five times in a row.

bonemerang.name: bonemerang
bonemerang.flavor_text: The user throws the bone it holds. The bone loops around to hit the target twice—coming and going.

rest.name: rest
rest.flavor_text: The user goes to sleep for two turns. This fully restores the user's HP and cures any status conditions.
rest.short_effect: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.

rock-slide.name: rock-slide
rock-slide.flavor_text: Large boulders are hurled at opposing Pokémon to inflict damage. This may also make the opposing Pokémon flinch.
rock-slide.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.

hyper-fang.name: hyper-fang
hyper-fang.flavor_text: The user bites hard on the target with its sharp front fangs. This may also make the target flinch.
hyper-fang.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.

sharpen.name: sharpen
sharpen.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
sharpen.short_effect: Raises the user's Attack by one stage.

conversion.name: conversion
conversion.flavor_text: The user changes its type to become the same type as the move at the top of the list of moves it knows.
conversion.short_effect: User's type changes to the type of one of its moves at random.

tri-attack.name: tri-attack
tri-attack.flavor_text: The user strikes with a simultaneous three-beam attack. This may also burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.
tri-attack.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.

super-fang.name: super-fang
super-fang.flavor_text: The user chomps hard on the target with its sharp front fangs. This cuts the target's HP in half.
super-fang.short_effect: Inflicts damage equal to half the target's HP.

slash.name: slash
slash.flavor_text: The target is attacked with a slash of claws, scythes, or the like. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.
slash.short_effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

substitute.name: substitute
substitute.flavor_text: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.
substitute.short_effect: Transfers 1/4 of the user's max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.

struggle.name: struggle
struggle.flavor_text: This attack is used in desperation only if the user has no PP. It also damages the user a little.
struggle.short_effect: User takes 1/4 its max HP in recoil.

sketch.name: sketch
sketch.flavor_text: This move enables the user to permanently learn the move last used by the target. Once used, Sketch disappears.
sketch.short_effect: Permanently becomes the target's last used move.

triple-kick.name: triple-kick
triple-kick.flavor_text: A consecutive three-kick attack that becomes more powerful with each successful hit.
triple-kick.short_effect: Hits three times, increasing power by 100% with each successful hit.

thief.name: thief
thief.flavor_text: The user attacks and steals the target's held item simultaneously. The user can't steal anything if it already holds an item.

spider-web.name: spider-web
spider-web.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
spider-web.short_effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle.

mind-reader.name: mind-reader
mind-reader.flavor_text: The user senses the target’s movements with its mind to ensure its next attack does not miss the target.
mind-reader.short_effect: Ensures that the user's next move will hit the target.

nightmare.name: nightmare
nightmare.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
nightmare.short_effect: Target loses 1/4 its max HP every turn as long as it's asleep.

flame-wheel.name: flame-wheel
flame-wheel.flavor_text: The user attacks by cloaking itself in fire and charging at the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.
flame-wheel.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.  Lets frozen Pokémon thaw themselves.

snore.name: snore
snore.flavor_text: This attack can be used only if the user is asleep. The harsh noise may also make the target flinch.
snore.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

curse.name: curse
curse.flavor_text: A move that has different effects depending on whether the user is a Ghost type or not.
curse.short_effect: Ghosts pay half their max HP to hurt the target every turn.  Others decrease Speed but raise Attack and Defense.

flail.name: flail
flail.flavor_text: The user flails about aimlessly to attack. The less HP the user has, the greater the move's power.
flail.short_effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has less HP remaining, with a maximum of 200 power.

conversion-2.name: conversion-2
conversion-2.flavor_text: The user changes its type to make itself resistant to the type of the move the target used last.
conversion-2.short_effect: Changes the user's type to a random type either resistant or immune to the last move used against it.

aeroblast.name: aeroblast
aeroblast.flavor_text: A vortex of air is shot at the target to inflict damage. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.
aeroblast.short_effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

cotton-spore.name: cotton-spore
cotton-spore.flavor_text: The user releases cotton-like spores that cling to opposing Pokémon. This harshly lowers their Speed stats.
cotton-spore.short_effect: Lowers the target's Speed by two stages.

reversal.name: reversal
reversal.flavor_text: An all-out attack that becomes more powerful the less HP the user has.
reversal.short_effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has less HP remaining, with a maximum of 200 power.

spite.name: spite
spite.flavor_text: The user unleashes its grudge on the move last used by the target by cutting 4 PP from it.
spite.short_effect: Lowers the PP of the target's last used move by 4.

powder-snow.name: powder-snow
powder-snow.flavor_text: The user attacks with a chilling gust of powdery snow. This may also leave opposing Pokémon frozen.
powder-snow.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to freeze the target.

protect.name: protect
protect.flavor_text: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.
protect.short_effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

mach-punch.name: mach-punch
mach-punch.flavor_text: The user throws a punch at blinding speed. This move always goes first.
mach-punch.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

scary-face.name: scary-face
scary-face.flavor_text: The user frightens the target with a scary face to harshly lower its Speed stat.
scary-face.short_effect: Lowers the target's Speed by two stages.

feint-attack.name: feint-attack
feint-attack.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

sweet-kiss.name: sweet-kiss
sweet-kiss.flavor_text: The user kisses the target with a sweet, angelic cuteness that causes confusion.

belly-drum.name: belly-drum
belly-drum.flavor_text: The user maximizes its Attack stat but loses HP equal to half its max HP.
belly-drum.short_effect: User pays half its max HP to max out its Attack.

sludge-bomb.name: sludge-bomb
sludge-bomb.flavor_text: The user hurls unsanitary sludge at the target to inflict damage. This may also poison the target.
sludge-bomb.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to poison the target.

mud-slap.name: mud-slap
mud-slap.flavor_text: The user hurls mud in the target's face to inflict damage and lower its accuracy.
mud-slap.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's accuracy by one stage.

octazooka.name: octazooka
octazooka.flavor_text: The user attacks by spraying ink in the target’s face or eyes. This may also lower the target’s accuracy.
octazooka.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's accuracy by one stage.

spikes.name: spikes
spikes.flavor_text: The user lays a trap of spikes at the feet of the opposing team. The spikes will damage opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.
spikes.short_effect: Scatters Spikes, hurting opposing Pokémon that switch in.

zap-cannon.name: zap-cannon
zap-cannon.flavor_text: The user attacks by firing an electric blast like a cannon. This also leaves the target with paralysis.
zap-cannon.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.

foresight.name: foresight
foresight.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
foresight.short_effect: Forces the target to have no Evade, and allows it to be hit by Normal and Fighting moves even if it's a Ghost.

destiny-bond.name: destiny-bond
destiny-bond.flavor_text: If the user is knocked out after using this move, the Pokémon that knocked it out will also faint. This move's chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.
destiny-bond.short_effect: If the user faints this turn, the target automatically will, too.

perish-song.name: perish-song
perish-song.flavor_text: Any Pokémon that hears this song faints in three turns, unless it switches out of battle.
perish-song.short_effect: User and target both faint after three turns.

icy-wind.name: icy-wind
icy-wind.flavor_text: The user attacks with a gust of chilled air. This also lowers opposing Pokémon's Speed stats.
icy-wind.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's Speed by one stage.

detect.name: detect
detect.flavor_text: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.
detect.short_effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

bone-rush.name: bone-rush
bone-rush.flavor_text: The user attacks by striking the target with a hard bone. This move hits two to five times in a row.

lock-on.name: lock-on
lock-on.flavor_text: The user takes sure aim at the target. This ensures the user's next move does not miss that target.
lock-on.short_effect: Ensures that the user's next move will hit the target.

outrage.name: outrage
outrage.flavor_text: The user rampages and attacks for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.
outrage.short_effect: Hits every turn for 2-3 turns, then confuses the user.

sandstorm.name: sandstorm
sandstorm.flavor_text: A five-turn sandstorm is summoned to damage all Pokémon except Rock, Ground, and Steel types. The sandstorm also boosts the Sp. Def stats of Rock types.
sandstorm.short_effect: Changes the weather to a sandstorm for five turns.

giga-drain.name: giga-drain
giga-drain.flavor_text: A nutrient-draining attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.
giga-drain.short_effect: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.

endure.name: endure
endure.flavor_text: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. This move's chance of failing rises if used in succession.
endure.short_effect: Prevents the user's HP from lowering below 1 this turn.

charm.name: charm
charm.flavor_text: The user gazes at the target rather charmingly, making it less wary. This harshly lowers the target's Attack stat.
charm.short_effect: Lowers the target's Attack by two stages.

rollout.name: rollout
rollout.flavor_text: The user continually rolls into the target over five turns. This attack becomes more powerful each time it hits.
rollout.short_effect: Power doubles every turn this move is used in succession after the first, resetting after five turns.

false-swipe.name: false-swipe
false-swipe.flavor_text: A restrained attack that prevents the target from fainting. The target is left with at least 1 HP.
false-swipe.short_effect: Cannot lower the target's HP below 1.

swagger.name: swagger
swagger.flavor_text: The user enrages and confuses the target. However, this also sharply boosts the target's Attack stat.
swagger.short_effect: Raises the target's Attack by two stages and confuses the target.

milk-drink.name: milk-drink
milk-drink.flavor_text: The user restores its own HP by up to half its max HP.
milk-drink.short_effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.

spark.name: spark
spark.flavor_text: The user attacks the target with an electrically charged tackle. This may also leave the target with paralysis.
spark.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.

fury-cutter.name: fury-cutter
fury-cutter.flavor_text: The user attacks by slashing the target with scythes, claws, or the like. This attack becomes more powerful if it hits in succession.
fury-cutter.short_effect: Power doubles every turn this move is used in succession after the first, maxing out after five turns.

steel-wing.name: steel-wing
steel-wing.flavor_text: The target is hit with wings of steel. This may also boost the user's Defense stat.
steel-wing.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise the user's Defense by one stage.

mean-look.name: mean-look
mean-look.flavor_text: The user pins the target with a dark, arresting look. The target becomes unable to flee.
mean-look.short_effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle.

attract.name: attract
attract.flavor_text: If the target is of the opposite gender to the user, it becomes infatuated with the user and will sometimes be unable to use its moves.
attract.short_effect: Target falls in love if it has the opposite gender, and has a 50% chance to refuse attacking the user.

sleep-talk.name: sleep-talk
sleep-talk.flavor_text: The user randomly uses one of the moves it knows. This move can only be used while the user is asleep.
sleep-talk.short_effect: Randomly uses one of the user's other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

heal-bell.name: heal-bell
heal-bell.flavor_text: The user makes a soothing bell chime to cure the status conditions of all its fellow party Pokémon and allies.
heal-bell.short_effect: Cures the entire party of major status effects.

return.name: return
return.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
return.short_effect: Power increases with happiness, up to a maximum of 102.

present.name: present
present.flavor_text: The user attacks by giving the target a gift with a hidden trap. The gift restores HP sometimes, however.
present.short_effect: Randomly inflicts damage with power from 40 to 120 or heals the target for 1/4 its max HP.

frustration.name: frustration
frustration.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
frustration.short_effect: Power increases as happiness decreases, up to a maximum of 102.

safeguard.name: safeguard
safeguard.flavor_text: The user creates a protective field that prevents status conditions for five turns.
safeguard.short_effect: Protects the user's field from major status ailments and confusion for five turns.

pain-split.name: pain-split
pain-split.flavor_text: The user adds its HP to the target's HP, then equally splits the combined HP between the target and itself.
pain-split.short_effect: Sets the user's and targets's HP to the average of their current HP.

sacred-fire.name: sacred-fire
sacred-fire.flavor_text: The target is razed with a mystical fire of great intensity. This may also leave the target with a burn.
sacred-fire.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.  Lets frozen Pokémon thaw themselves.

magnitude.name: magnitude
magnitude.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

dynamic-punch.name: dynamic-punch
dynamic-punch.flavor_text: The user attacks by punching the target with full concentrated power. This also confuses the target.
dynamic-punch.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to confuse the target.

megahorn.name: megahorn
megahorn.flavor_text: Using its tough and impressive horn, the user rams into the target with no letup.
megahorn.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

dragon-breath.name: dragon-breath
dragon-breath.flavor_text: The user exhales a mighty gust that inflicts damage. This may also leave the target with paralysis.
dragon-breath.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.

baton-pass.name: baton-pass
baton-pass.flavor_text: The user switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting and passes along any stat changes.
baton-pass.short_effect: Allows the trainer to switch out the user and pass effects along to its replacement.

encore.name: encore
encore.flavor_text: The user compels the target to keep using the move it encored for three turns.
encore.short_effect: Forces the target to repeat its last used move every turn for 2 to 6 turns.

pursuit.name: pursuit
pursuit.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
pursuit.short_effect: Has double power against, and can hit, Pokémon attempting to switch out.

rapid-spin.name: rapid-spin
rapid-spin.flavor_text: The user performs a spin attack that can also eliminate the effects of such moves as Bind, Wrap, and Leech Seed. This also boosts the user's Speed stat.
rapid-spin.short_effect: Frees the user from binding moves, removes Leech Seed, and blows away Spikes.

sweet-scent.name: sweet-scent
sweet-scent.flavor_text: The user releases a scent that harshly lowers opposing Pokémon's evasiveness.
sweet-scent.short_effect: Lowers the target's evasion by one stage.

iron-tail.name: iron-tail
iron-tail.flavor_text: The target is slammed with a steel-hard tail. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.
iron-tail.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's Defense by one stage.

metal-claw.name: metal-claw
metal-claw.flavor_text: The target is raked with steel claws. This may also boost the user's Attack stat.
metal-claw.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise the user's Attack by one stage.

vital-throw.name: vital-throw
vital-throw.flavor_text: The user attacks last. In return, this throw move never misses.

morning-sun.name: morning-sun
morning-sun.flavor_text: The user restores its own HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.
morning-sun.short_effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.  Affected by weather.

synthesis.name: synthesis
synthesis.flavor_text: The user restores its own HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.
synthesis.short_effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.  Affected by weather.

moonlight.name: moonlight
moonlight.flavor_text: The user restores its own HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.
moonlight.short_effect: Heals the user by half its max HP.  Affected by weather.

hidden-power.name: hidden-power
hidden-power.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
hidden-power.short_effect: Power and type depend upon user's IVs.  Power can range from 30 to 70.

cross-chop.name: cross-chop
cross-chop.flavor_text: The user delivers a double chop with its forearms crossed. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.
cross-chop.short_effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

twister.name: twister
twister.flavor_text: The user whips up a vicious tornado to tear at opposing Pokémon. This may also make them flinch.
twister.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.

rain-dance.name: rain-dance
rain-dance.flavor_text: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type attacks. The rain also lowers the power of Fire-type attacks.
rain-dance.short_effect: Changes the weather to rain for five turns.

sunny-day.name: sunny-day
sunny-day.flavor_text: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type attacks. The sunlight also lowers the power of Water-type attacks.
sunny-day.short_effect: Changes the weather to sunny for five turns.

crunch.name: crunch
crunch.flavor_text: The user crunches up the target with sharp fangs. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.
crunch.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's Defense by one stage.

mirror-coat.name: mirror-coat
mirror-coat.flavor_text: A retaliatory attack that counters any special move, inflicting double the damage taken.
mirror-coat.short_effect: Inflicts twice the damage the user received from the last special hit it took.

psych-up.name: psych-up
psych-up.flavor_text: The user hypnotizes itself into copying any stat change made by the target.
psych-up.short_effect: Discards the user's stat changes and copies the target's.

extreme-speed.name: extreme-speed
extreme-speed.flavor_text: The user charges the target at blinding speed. This move always goes first.
extreme-speed.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

ancient-power.name: ancient-power
ancient-power.flavor_text: The user attacks with a prehistoric power. This may also boost all the user's stats at once.
ancient-power.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise all of the user's stats by one stage.

shadow-ball.name: shadow-ball
shadow-ball.flavor_text: The user attacks by hurling a shadowy blob at the target. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.
shadow-ball.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by one stage.

future-sight.name: future-sight
future-sight.flavor_text: Two turns after this move is used, a hunk of psychic energy attacks the target.
future-sight.short_effect: Hits the target two turns later.

rock-smash.name: rock-smash
rock-smash.flavor_text: The user attacks with a punch. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.
rock-smash.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's Defense by one stage.

whirlpool.name: whirlpool
whirlpool.flavor_text: The user traps the target inside a violent, swirling whirlpool that inflicts damage for four to five turns.
whirlpool.short_effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle and inflicts 1/16 its max HP in damage for 2-5 turns.

beat-up.name: beat-up
beat-up.flavor_text: The user gets all party Pokémon to attack the target. The more party Pokémon, the greater the number of attacks.
beat-up.short_effect: Hits once for every conscious Pokémon the trainer has.

fake-out.name: fake-out
fake-out.flavor_text: This attack hits first and makes the target flinch. It works only on the first turn each time the user enters battle.
fake-out.short_effect: Can only be used as the first move after the user enters battle.  Causes the target to flinch.

uproar.name: uproar
uproar.flavor_text: The user attacks in an uproar for three turns. During that time, no Pokémon can fall asleep.
uproar.short_effect: Forced to use this move for several turns.  Pokémon cannot fall asleep in that time.

stockpile.name: stockpile
stockpile.flavor_text: The user stores power and boosts its Defense and Sp. Def stats. This move can be used up to three times.
stockpile.short_effect: Stores energy up to three times for use with Spit Up and Swallow.

spit-up.name: spit-up
spit-up.flavor_text: The power stored using the move Stockpile is released at once in an attack. The more power is stored, the greater the move's power.
spit-up.short_effect: Power is 100 times the amount of energy Stockpiled.

swallow.name: swallow

simple-beam.name: simple-beam
simple-beam.flavor_text: The user emits a mysterious psychic wave that changes the target's Ability to Simple.
simple-beam.short_effect: Changes the target's ability to Simple.

entrainment.name: entrainment
entrainment.flavor_text: The user dances with an odd rhythm that compels the target to mimic it, making the target's Ability the same as the user's.
entrainment.short_effect: Copies the user's ability onto the target.

after-you.name: after-you
after-you.flavor_text: The user helps the target and makes it use its move right after the user.
after-you.short_effect: Makes the target act next this turn.

round.name: round
round.flavor_text: The user attacks the target with a song. If others use this move, they will act immediately after the initial user, and the power of their Rounds will be boosted.
round.short_effect: Has double power if it's used more than once per turn.

echoed-voice.name: echoed-voice
echoed-voice.flavor_text: The user attacks the target with an echoing voice. If this move is used consecutively by any Pokémon, its power is boosted.
echoed-voice.short_effect: Power increases by 100% for each consecutive use by any friendly Pokémon, to a maximum of 200.

chip-away.name: chip-away
chip-away.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.

clear-smog.name: clear-smog
clear-smog.flavor_text: The user attacks the target by throwing a clump of special mud. All stat changes are eliminated.
clear-smog.short_effect: Removes all of the target's stat modifiers.

stored-power.name: stored-power
stored-power.flavor_text: The user attacks the target with stored power. The more the user's stats are boosted, the greater the move's power.
stored-power.short_effect: Power is higher the more the user's stats have been raised, to a maximum of 31×.

quick-guard.name: quick-guard
quick-guard.flavor_text: The user protects itself and its allies from priority moves.
quick-guard.short_effect: Prevents any priority moves from hitting friendly Pokémon this turn.

ally-switch.name: ally-switch
ally-switch.flavor_text: The user teleports using a strange power and switches places with one of its allies. This move's chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.
ally-switch.short_effect: User switches places with the friendly Pokémon opposite it.

scald.name: scald
scald.flavor_text: The user attacks by shooting boiling hot water at the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.
scald.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.

shell-smash.name: shell-smash
shell-smash.flavor_text: The user breaks its shell, which lowers its Defense and Sp. Def stats but sharply boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats.
shell-smash.short_effect: Raises user's Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by two stages.  Lower user's Defense and Special Defense by one stage.

heal-pulse.name: heal-pulse
heal-pulse.flavor_text: The user emits a healing pulse that restores the target's HP by up to half its max HP.
heal-pulse.short_effect: Heals the target for half its max HP.

hex.name: hex
hex.flavor_text: This relentless attack does massive damage to a target affected by status conditions.
hex.short_effect: Has double power if the target has a major status ailment.

sky-drop.name: sky-drop
sky-drop.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
sky-drop.short_effect: Carries the target high into the air, dodging all attacks against either, and drops it next turn.

shift-gear.name: shift-gear
shift-gear.flavor_text: The user rotates its gears, boosting its Attack stat and sharply boosting its Speed stat.
shift-gear.short_effect: Raises the user's Attack by one stage and its Speed by two stages.

circle-throw.name: circle-throw
circle-throw.flavor_text: The target is thrown, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.
circle-throw.short_effect: Ends wild battles.  Forces trainers to switch Pokémon.

incinerate.name: incinerate
incinerate.flavor_text: The user attacks opposing Pokémon with fire. If a Pokémon is holding a certain item, such as a Berry, the item becomes burned up and unusable.

quash.name: quash
quash.flavor_text: The user suppresses the target and makes its move go last.
quash.short_effect: Makes the target act last this turn.

acrobatics.name: acrobatics
acrobatics.flavor_text: The user nimbly strikes the target. This attack does massive damage if the user isn't holding an item.
acrobatics.short_effect: Has double power if the user has no held item.

reflect-type.name: reflect-type
reflect-type.flavor_text: The user reflects the target's type to become the same type as the target.

retaliate.name: retaliate
retaliate.flavor_text: The user takes revenge for a fainted ally. This move's power is boosted if an ally fainted in the previous turn.
retaliate.short_effect: Has double power if a friendly Pokémon fainted last turn.

final-gambit.name: final-gambit
final-gambit.flavor_text: The user risks everything to attack the target. The user faints but inflicts damage equal to its own HP.
final-gambit.short_effect: Inflicts damage equal to the user's remaining HP.  User faints.

bestow.name: bestow
bestow.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
bestow.short_effect: Gives the user's held item to the target.

inferno.name: inferno
inferno.flavor_text: The user attacks by engulfing the target in an intense fire. This leaves the target with a burn.
inferno.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.

water-pledge.name: water-pledge
water-pledge.flavor_text: A column of water hits the target. When used with its fire counterpart, this move's power is boosted and a rainbow appears.
water-pledge.short_effect: With Grass Pledge, halves opposing Pokémon's Speed for four turns.

fire-pledge.name: fire-pledge
fire-pledge.flavor_text: A column of fire hits the target. When used with its grass counterpart, this move's power is boosted and a vast sea of fire appears.
fire-pledge.short_effect: With Water Pledge, doubles the effect chance of friendly Pokémon's moves for four turns.

grass-pledge.name: grass-pledge
grass-pledge.flavor_text: A column of grass hits the target. When used with its water counterpart, this move's power is boosted and a vast swamp appears.
grass-pledge.short_effect: With Fire Pledge, damages opposing Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP every turn for four turns.

volt-switch.name: volt-switch
volt-switch.flavor_text: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.
volt-switch.short_effect: User must switch out after attacking.

struggle-bug.name: struggle-bug
struggle-bug.flavor_text: The user attacks by struggling against opposing Pokémon. This also lowers their Sp. Atk stats.
struggle-bug.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by one stage.

bulldoze.name: bulldoze
bulldoze.flavor_text: The user strikes everything around it by stomping down on the ground. This lowers the Speed stats of those hit.
bulldoze.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's Speed by one stage.

frost-breath.name: frost-breath
frost-breath.flavor_text: The user attacks by blowing its cold breath on the target. This move always lands a critical hit.

dragon-tail.name: dragon-tail
dragon-tail.flavor_text: The target is knocked away, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.
dragon-tail.short_effect: Ends wild battles.  Forces trainers to switch Pokémon.

work-up.name: work-up
work-up.flavor_text: The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Atk stats are boosted.
work-up.short_effect: Raises the user's Attack and Special Attack by one stage each.

electroweb.name: electroweb
electroweb.flavor_text: The user captures opposing Pokémon in an electric net to inflict damage. This also lowers their Speed stats.
electroweb.short_effect: Lowers the target's Speed by one stage.

wild-charge.name: wild-charge
wild-charge.flavor_text: The user shrouds itself in electricity and smashes into its target. This also damages the user a little.
wild-charge.short_effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

drill-run.name: drill-run
drill-run.flavor_text: The user crashes into the target while rotating its body like a drill. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.
drill-run.short_effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

dual-chop.name: dual-chop
dual-chop.flavor_text: The user attacks its target by hitting it with brutal strikes. The target is hit twice in a row.

heart-stamp.name: heart-stamp
heart-stamp.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
heart-stamp.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.

horn-leech.name: horn-leech
horn-leech.flavor_text: The user drains the target's energy with its horns. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.
horn-leech.short_effect: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.

sacred-sword.name: sacred-sword
sacred-sword.flavor_text: The user attacks by slicing with a sword. The target's stat changes don't affect the damage inflicted by this move.

razor-shell.name: razor-shell
razor-shell.flavor_text: The user cuts the target with sharp shells to inflict damage. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.
razor-shell.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's Defense by one stage.

heat-crash.name: heat-crash
heat-crash.flavor_text: The user slams into the target with its flame-covered body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the move's power.
heat-crash.short_effect: Power is higher when the user weighs more than the target, up to a maximum of 120.

leaf-tornado.name: leaf-tornado
leaf-tornado.flavor_text: The user attacks its target by encircling it in sharp leaves. This attack may also lower the target’s accuracy.
leaf-tornado.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's accuracy by one stage.

steamroller.name: steamroller
steamroller.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
steamroller.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.

cotton-guard.name: cotton-guard
cotton-guard.flavor_text: The user protects itself by wrapping its body in soft cotton, drastically boosting its Defense stat.
cotton-guard.short_effect: Raises the user's Defense by three stages.

night-daze.name: night-daze
night-daze.flavor_text: The user looses a pitch-black shock wave at the target to inflict damage. This may also lower the target's accuracy.
night-daze.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's accuracy by one stage.

psystrike.name: psystrike
psystrike.flavor_text: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. This move deals physical damage.
psystrike.short_effect: Inflicts damage based on the target's Defense, not Special Defense.

tail-slap.name: tail-slap
tail-slap.flavor_text: The user attacks by striking the target with its hard tail. This move hits two to five times in a row.

hurricane.name: hurricane
hurricane.flavor_text: The user attacks by wrapping its opponent in a fierce wind. This may also confuse the target.
hurricane.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to confuse the target.

head-charge.name: head-charge
head-charge.flavor_text: The user charges its head into its target, using its powerful guard hair. This also damages the user a little.
head-charge.short_effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

gear-grind.name: gear-grind
gear-grind.flavor_text: The user attacks by throwing steel gears at its target twice.

searing-shot.name: searing-shot
searing-shot.flavor_text: The user torches everything around it in an inferno of scarlet flames. This may also leave those it hits with a burn.
searing-shot.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.

techno-blast.name: techno-blast
techno-blast.flavor_text: The user fires a beam of light at its target. The move’s type changes depending on the Drive the user holds.
techno-blast.short_effect: If the user is holding a appropriate plate or drive, the damage inflicted will match it.

relic-song.name: relic-song
relic-song.flavor_text: The user sings an ancient song and attacks by appealing to the hearts of the listening opposing Pokémon. This may also induce sleep.
relic-song.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to put the target to sleep.

secret-sword.name: secret-sword
secret-sword.flavor_text: The user cuts with its long horn. The odd power contained in the horn deals physical damage to the target.
secret-sword.short_effect: Inflicts damage based on the target's Defense, not Special Defense.

glaciate.name: glaciate
glaciate.flavor_text: The user attacks by blowing freezing cold air at opposing Pokémon. This also lowers their Speed stats.
glaciate.short_effect: Lowers the target's Speed by one stage.

bolt-strike.name: bolt-strike
bolt-strike.flavor_text: The user surrounds itself with a great amount of electricity and charges the target. This may also leave the target with paralysis.
bolt-strike.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.

blue-flare.name: blue-flare
blue-flare.flavor_text: The user attacks by engulfing the target in an intense, yet beautiful, blue flame. This may also leave the target with a burn.
blue-flare.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.

fiery-dance.name: fiery-dance
fiery-dance.flavor_text: Cloaked in flames, the user attacks the target by dancing and flapping its wings. This may also boost the user's Sp. Atk stat.
fiery-dance.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise the user's Special Attack by one stage.

freeze-shock.name: freeze-shock
freeze-shock.flavor_text: The turn after using this move, the user hits the target with electrically charged ice to inflict damage. This may also leave the target with paralysis.
freeze-shock.short_effect: Requires a turn to charge before attacking.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.

ice-burn.name: ice-burn
ice-burn.flavor_text: The turn after using this move, the user surrounds the target with an ultracold, freezing wind to inflict damage. This may also leave the target with a burn.
ice-burn.short_effect: Requires a turn to charge before attacking.  Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.

snarl.name: snarl
snarl.flavor_text: The user yells as if it's ranting about something, which lowers the Sp. Atk stats of opposing Pokémon.
snarl.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by one stage.

icicle-crash.name: icicle-crash
icicle-crash.flavor_text: The user attacks by crashing large icicles onto the target. This may also make the target flinch.
icicle-crash.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to make the target flinch.

v-create.name: v-create
v-create.flavor_text: With a hot flame on its forehead, the user hurls itself at its target. This lowers the user’s Defense, Sp. Def, and Speed stats.
v-create.short_effect: Lowers the user's Defense, Special Defense, and Speed by one stage each.

fusion-flare.name: fusion-flare
fusion-flare.flavor_text: The user brings down a giant flame. This move's power is boosted when influenced by an enormous lightning bolt.
fusion-flare.short_effect: With Fusion Bolt, inflicts double damage.

fusion-bolt.name: fusion-bolt
fusion-bolt.flavor_text: The user throws down a giant lightning bolt. This move's power is boosted when influenced by an enormous flame.
fusion-bolt.short_effect: With Fusion Flare, inflicts double damage.

flying-press.name: flying-press
flying-press.flavor_text: The user dives down onto the target from the sky. This move is Fighting and Flying type simultaneously.
flying-press.short_effect: Deals both fighting and flying-type damage.

mat-block.name: mat-block
mat-block.flavor_text: Using a pulled-up mat as a shield, the user protects itself and its allies from damaging moves. This does not stop status moves.
mat-block.short_effect: Protects all friendly Pokémon from damaging moves.  Only works on the first turn after the user is sent out.

belch.name: belch
belch.flavor_text: The user lets out a damaging belch at the target. The user must eat a held Berry to use this move.
belch.short_effect: Can only be used after the user has eaten a berry.

rototiller.name: rototiller
rototiller.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
rototiller.short_effect: Raises the Attack and Special Attack of all grass Pokémon in battle.

sticky-web.name: sticky-web
sticky-web.flavor_text: The user weaves a sticky net around the opposing team, which lowers their Speed stats upon switching into battle.
sticky-web.short_effect: Covers the opposing field, lowering opponents' Speed by one stage upon switching in.

fell-stinger.name: fell-stinger
fell-stinger.flavor_text: When the user knocks out a target with this move, the user's Attack stat is boosted drastically.
fell-stinger.short_effect: Raises the user's Attack by two stages if it KOs the target.

phantom-force.name: phantom-force
phantom-force.flavor_text: The user vanishes somewhere, then strikes the target on the next turn. This move hits even if the target protects itself.
phantom-force.short_effect: User vanishes, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.  Hits through Protect and Detect.

trick-or-treat.name: trick-or-treat
trick-or-treat.flavor_text: The user takes the target trick-or-treating. This adds Ghost type to the target’s type.
trick-or-treat.short_effect: Adds ghost to the target's types.

noble-roar.name: noble-roar
noble-roar.flavor_text: Letting out a noble roar, the user intimidates the target and lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats.
noble-roar.short_effect: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by one stage.

ion-deluge.name: ion-deluge
ion-deluge.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
ion-deluge.short_effect: Changes all normal moves to electric moves for the rest of the turn.

parabolic-charge.name: parabolic-charge
parabolic-charge.flavor_text: The user attacks everything around it. The user's HP is restored by half the damage taken by those hit.
parabolic-charge.short_effect: Heals the user for half the total damage dealt to all targets.

forests-curse.name: forests-curse
forests-curse.flavor_text: The user puts a forest curse on the target. This adds Grass type to the target's type.
forests-curse.short_effect: Adds grass to the target's types.

petal-blizzard.name: petal-blizzard
petal-blizzard.flavor_text: The user stirs up a violent petal blizzard and damages everything around it.

freeze-dry.name: freeze-dry
freeze-dry.flavor_text: The user rapidly cools the target. This may also leave the target frozen. This move is super effective on Water types.

disarming-voice.name: disarming-voice
disarming-voice.flavor_text: Letting out a charming cry, the user does emotional damage to opposing Pokémon. This attack never misses.

parting-shot.name: parting-shot
parting-shot.flavor_text: With a parting threat, the user lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats. Then it switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting.
parting-shot.short_effect: Lowers all targets' Attack and Special Attack by one stage.  Makes the user switch out.

topsy-turvy.name: topsy-turvy
topsy-turvy.flavor_text: All stat changes affecting the target turn topsy-turvy and become the opposite of what they were.

draining-kiss.name: draining-kiss
draining-kiss.flavor_text: The user steals the target's HP with a kiss. The user's HP is restored by over half the damage taken by the target.
draining-kiss.short_effect: Drains 75% of the damage inflicted to heal the user.

crafty-shield.name: crafty-shield
crafty-shield.flavor_text: The user protects itself and its allies from status moves with a mysterious power. This does not stop moves that do damage.
crafty-shield.short_effect: Protects all friendly Pokémon from non-damaging moves.

flower-shield.name: flower-shield
flower-shield.flavor_text: The user raises the Defense stats of all Grass-type Pokémon in battle with a mysterious power.
flower-shield.short_effect: Raises the Defense of all grass Pokémon in battle.

grassy-terrain.name: grassy-terrain
grassy-terrain.flavor_text: The user turns the ground into Grassy Terrain for five turns. This restores the HP of Pokémon on the ground a little every turn and powers up Grass-type moves.
grassy-terrain.short_effect: For five turns, heals all Pokémon on the ground for 1/16 max HP each turn and strengthens their grass moves to 1.5× their power.

misty-terrain.name: misty-terrain
misty-terrain.flavor_text: This protects Pokémon on the ground from status conditions and halves damage from Dragon-type moves for five turns.
misty-terrain.short_effect: For five turns, protects all Pokémon on the ground from major status ailments and confusion, and halves the power of incoming dragon moves.

electrify.name: electrify
electrify.flavor_text: If the target is electrified before it uses a move during that turn, the target’s move becomes Electric type.
electrify.short_effect: Changes the target's move's type to electric if it hasn't moved yet this turn.

play-rough.name: play-rough
play-rough.flavor_text: The user attacks by playing rough with the target. This may also lower the target's Attack stat.
play-rough.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's Attack by one stage.

fairy-wind.name: fairy-wind
fairy-wind.flavor_text: The user attacks by stirring up a fairy wind to strike the target.
fairy-wind.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moonblast.name: moonblast
moonblast.flavor_text: Borrowing the power of the moon, the user attacks the target. This may also lower the target's Sp. Atk stat.
moonblast.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by one stage.

boomburst.name: boomburst
boomburst.flavor_text: The user attacks everything around it with the destructive power of a terrible explosive sound.

fairy-lock.name: fairy-lock
fairy-lock.flavor_text: By locking down the battlefield, the user keeps all Pokémon from fleeing during the next turn.
fairy-lock.short_effect: Prevents all Pokémon from fleeing or switching out during the next turn.

kings-shield.name: kings-shield
kings-shield.flavor_text: The user takes a defensive stance while it protects itself from damage. It also lowers the Attack stat of any attacker that makes direct contact.
kings-shield.short_effect: Blocks damaging attacks and lowers attacking Pokémon's Attack by two stages on contact.  Switches Aegislash to Shield Forme.

play-nice.name: play-nice
play-nice.flavor_text: The user and the target become friends, and the target loses its will to fight. This lowers the target's Attack stat.
play-nice.short_effect: Lowers the target's Attack by one stage.

confide.name: confide
confide.flavor_text: The user tells the target a secret, and the target loses its ability to concentrate. This lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.
confide.short_effect: Lowers the target's Special Attack by one stage.

diamond-storm.name: diamond-storm
diamond-storm.flavor_text: The user whips up a storm of diamonds to damage opposing Pokémon. This may also sharply boost the user's Defense stat.
diamond-storm.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to raise the user's Defense by two stages for each target hit.

steam-eruption.name: steam-eruption
steam-eruption.flavor_text: The user immerses the target in superheated steam. This may also leave the target with a burn.
steam-eruption.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.

hyperspace-hole.name: hyperspace-hole
hyperspace-hole.flavor_text: Using a hyperspace hole, the user appears right next to the target and strikes. This attack can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect.

water-shuriken.name: water-shuriken
water-shuriken.flavor_text: The user hits the target with throwing stars two to five times in a row. This move always goes first.

mystical-fire.name: mystical-fire
mystical-fire.flavor_text: The user attacks by breathing a special, hot fire. This also lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.
mystical-fire.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by one stage.

spiky-shield.name: spiky-shield
spiky-shield.flavor_text: In addition to protecting the user from attacks, this move also damages any attacker that makes direct contact.
spiky-shield.short_effect: Blocks damaging attacks and damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP.

aromatic-mist.name: aromatic-mist
aromatic-mist.flavor_text: The user boosts the Sp. Def stat of an ally Pokémon by using a mysterious aroma.
aromatic-mist.short_effect: Raises a selected ally's Special Defense by one stage.

eerie-impulse.name: eerie-impulse
eerie-impulse.flavor_text: The user's body generates an eerie impulse. Exposing the target to it harshly lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.
eerie-impulse.short_effect: Lowers the target's Special Attack by two stages.

venom-drench.name: venom-drench
venom-drench.flavor_text: Opposing Pokémon are drenched in an odd poisonous liquid. This lowers the Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats of a poisoned target.
venom-drench.short_effect: Lowers the target's Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by one stage if it is poisoned.

powder.name: powder
powder.flavor_text: The user covers the target in a combustible powder. If the target uses a Fire-type move, the powder explodes and damages the target.
powder.short_effect: Explodes if the target uses a fire move this turn, damaging it for 1/4 its max HP and preventing the move.

geomancy.name: geomancy
geomancy.flavor_text: The user absorbs energy and sharply raises its Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats on the next turn.
geomancy.short_effect: Takes one turn to charge, then raises the user's Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by two stages.

magnetic-flux.name: magnetic-flux
magnetic-flux.flavor_text: The user manipulates magnetic fields, which boosts the Defense and Sp. Def stats of ally Pokémon with the Plus Ability or the Minus Ability.
magnetic-flux.short_effect: Raises the Defense and Special Defense of all friendly Pokémon with plus or minus by one stage.

happy-hour.name: happy-hour
happy-hour.flavor_text: Using Happy Hour doubles the amount of prize money received after battle.

electric-terrain.name: electric-terrain
electric-terrain.flavor_text: The user turns the ground into Electric Terrain for five turns, powering up Electric-type moves. Pokémon on the ground can no longer fall asleep.
electric-terrain.short_effect: For five turns, prevents all Pokémon on the ground from sleeping and strengthens their electric moves to 1.5× their power.

dazzling-gleam.name: dazzling-gleam
dazzling-gleam.flavor_text: The user damages opposing Pokémon by emitting a powerful flash.
dazzling-gleam.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

celebrate.name: celebrate
celebrate.flavor_text: The Pokémon congratulates you on your special day!

hold-hands.name: hold-hands
hold-hands.flavor_text: The user and an ally hold hands. This makes them very happy.

baby-doll-eyes.name: baby-doll-eyes
baby-doll-eyes.flavor_text: The user stares at the target with its baby-doll eyes, which lowers the target's Attack stat. This move always goes first.
baby-doll-eyes.short_effect: Lowers the target's Attack by one stage.

nuzzle.name: nuzzle
nuzzle.flavor_text: The user attacks by nuzzling its electrified cheeks against the target. This also leaves the target with paralysis.
nuzzle.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.

hold-back.name: hold-back
hold-back.flavor_text: The user holds back when it attacks, and the target is left with at least 1 HP.
hold-back.short_effect: Cannot lower the target's HP below 1.

infestation.name: infestation
infestation.flavor_text: The target is infested and attacked for four to five turns. The target can't flee during this time.
infestation.short_effect: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.

power-up-punch.name: power-up-punch
power-up-punch.flavor_text: Striking opponents over and over makes the user’s fists harder. Hitting a target raises the Attack stat.
power-up-punch.short_effect: Raises the user's Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.

oblivion-wing.name: oblivion-wing
oblivion-wing.flavor_text: The user absorbs its target’s HP. The user’s HP is restored by over half of the damage taken by the target.
oblivion-wing.short_effect: Drains 75% of the damage inflicted to heal the user.

thousand-arrows.name: thousand-arrows
thousand-arrows.flavor_text: This move also hits opposing Pokémon that are in the air. Those Pokémon are knocked down to the ground.
thousand-arrows.short_effect: Grounds the target, and hits even Flying-type or levitating Pokémon.

thousand-waves.name: thousand-waves
thousand-waves.flavor_text: The user attacks with a wave that crawls along the ground. Those it hits can’t flee from battle.
thousand-waves.short_effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle.

lands-wrath.name: lands-wrath
lands-wrath.flavor_text: The user gathers the energy of the land and focuses that power on opposing Pokémon to damage them.
lands-wrath.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

light-of-ruin.name: light-of-ruin
light-of-ruin.flavor_text: Drawing power from the Eternal Flower, the user fires a powerful beam of light. This also damages the user quite a lot.
light-of-ruin.short_effect: User receives 1/2 the damage inflicted in recoil.

origin-pulse.name: origin-pulse
origin-pulse.flavor_text: The user attacks opposing Pokémon with countless beams of light that glow a deep and brilliant blue.
origin-pulse.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

precipice-blades.name: precipice-blades

precipice-blades.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

dragon-ascent.short_effect: Lowers the user's Defense and Special Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.

shore-up.name: shore-up
shore-up.flavor_text: The user restores its own HP by up to half its max HP. It regains more HP in a sandstorm.
shore-up.short_effect: Heals the user for ½ its max HP, or ⅔ during a sandstorm.

first-impression.name: first-impression
first-impression.flavor_text: Although this move has great power, it works only on the first turn each time the user enters battle.
first-impression.short_effect: Can only be used as the first move after the user enters battle.

baneful-bunker.name: baneful-bunker
baneful-bunker.flavor_text: In addition to protecting the user from attacks, this move also poisons any attacker that makes direct contact.
baneful-bunker.short_effect: Grants the user protection for the rest of the turn and poisons any Pokémon that tries to use a contact move on it.

spirit-shackle.name: spirit-shackle
spirit-shackle.flavor_text: The user attacks while simultaneously stitching the target's shadow to the ground to prevent the target from fleeing.

darkest-lariat.name: darkest-lariat
darkest-lariat.flavor_text: The user swings both arms and hits the target. The target's stat changes don't affect the damage inflicted by this move.

sparkling-aria.name: sparkling-aria
sparkling-aria.flavor_text: The user bursts into song, emitting many bubbles. Any Pokémon suffering from a burn will be cured by the touch of these bubbles.

ice-hammer.name: ice-hammer
ice-hammer.flavor_text: The user swings its strong, heavy fist at the target to inflict damage. This also lowers the user's Speed stat.
ice-hammer.short_effect: Lowers user's Speed by one stage.

floral-healing.name: floral-healing
floral-healing.flavor_text: The user restores the target's HP by up to half its max HP. More HP is restored when the ground is Grassy Terrain.
floral-healing.short_effect: Heals the target for ½ its max HP, or ⅔ on Grassy Terrain.

high-horsepower.name: high-horsepower
high-horsepower.flavor_text: The user fiercely attacks the target using its entire body.
high-horsepower.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

strength-sap.name: strength-sap
strength-sap.flavor_text: The user restores its own HP by the same amount as the target's Attack stat. It then lowers the target's Attack stat.
strength-sap.short_effect: Heals the user by the target's current Attack stat and lowers the target's Attack by one stage.

solar-blade.name: solar-blade
solar-blade.flavor_text: The user gathers light on the first turn, then fills a blade with the light's energy and attacks on the next turn.
solar-blade.short_effect: Requires a turn to charge before attacking.

leafage.name: leafage
leafage.flavor_text: The user attacks by pelting the target with leaves.
leafage.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

spotlight.name: spotlight
spotlight.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
spotlight.short_effect: Forces the target's opponents to aim at the target for the rest of the turn.

toxic-thread.name: toxic-thread
toxic-thread.flavor_text: The user shoots poisonous threads to poison the target and lower the target's Speed stat.
toxic-thread.short_effect: Poisons the target and lowers its Speed by one stage.

laser-focus.name: laser-focus
laser-focus.flavor_text: The user concentrates intensely. The attack on the next turn always results in a critical hit.
laser-focus.short_effect: Guarantees a critical hit with the user's next move.

gear-up.name: gear-up
gear-up.flavor_text: The user engages its gears to raise the Attack and Sp. Atk stats of ally Pokémon with the Plus or Minus Ability.
gear-up.short_effect: Raises the Attack and Special Attack of all friendly Pokémon with plus or minus by one stage.

throat-chop.name: throat-chop
throat-chop.flavor_text: The user attacks the target's throat, and the resultant suffering prevents the target from using sound-based moves for two turns.
throat-chop.short_effect: Prevents the target from using sound-based moves for two turns.

pollen-puff.name: pollen-puff
pollen-puff.flavor_text: The user attacks the enemy with a pollen puff that explodes. If the target is an ally, it gives the ally a pollen puff that restores its HP instead.
pollen-puff.short_effect: Damages opponents, but heals allies for 50% of their max HP.

anchor-shot.name: anchor-shot
anchor-shot.flavor_text: The user entangles the target with its anchor chain while attacking. The target becomes unable to flee.

psychic-terrain.name: psychic-terrain
psychic-terrain.flavor_text: This protects Pokémon on the ground from priority moves and powers up Psychic-type moves for five turns.
psychic-terrain.short_effect: Protects Pokémon on the ground from priority moves and increases the power of their  Psychic moves by 50%.

lunge.name: lunge
lunge.flavor_text: The user makes a lunge at the target, attacking with full force. This also lowers the target's Attack stat.
lunge.short_effect: Lowers the target's Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.

fire-lash.name: fire-lash
fire-lash.flavor_text: The user strikes the target with a burning lash. This also lowers the target's Defense stat.
fire-lash.short_effect: Lowers the target's Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.

power-trip.name: power-trip
power-trip.flavor_text: The user boasts its strength and attacks the target. The more the user's stats are boosted, the greater the move's power.
power-trip.short_effect: Power is higher the more the user's stats have been raised, to a maximum of 31×.

burn-up.name: burn-up
burn-up.flavor_text: To inflict massive damage, the user burns itself out. After using this move, the user will no longer be Fire type.
burn-up.short_effect: Removes the user's fire type after inflicting damage.

speed-swap.name: speed-swap
speed-swap.flavor_text: The user exchanges Speed stats with the target.
speed-swap.short_effect: Exchanges the user's Speed with the target's.

smart-strike.name: smart-strike
smart-strike.flavor_text: The user stabs the target with a sharp horn. This attack never misses.

purify.name: purify
purify.flavor_text: The user heals the target’s status condition. If the move succeeds, it also restores the user’s own HP.
purify.short_effect: Cures the target of a major status ailment and heals the user for 50% of its max HP.

revelation-dance.name: revelation-dance
revelation-dance.flavor_text: The user attacks the target by dancing with all its might. This move becomes the same type as the user's type.
revelation-dance.short_effect: Has the same type as the user.

core-enforcer.name: core-enforcer
core-enforcer.flavor_text: If the Pokémon the user has inflicted damage on have already used their moves, this move eliminates the effect of the target’s Ability.
core-enforcer.short_effect: Nullifies the target's ability if it moves earlier.

trop-kick.name: trop-kick
trop-kick.flavor_text: The user lands an intense kick of tropical origins on the target. This also lowers the target's Attack stat.
trop-kick.short_effect: Lowers the target's Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.

instruct.name: instruct
instruct.flavor_text: The user instructs the target to reuse the move last used by the target.
instruct.short_effect: Forces the target to repeat its last used move.

beak-blast.name: beak-blast
beak-blast.flavor_text: The user first heats up its beak, and then it attacks the target. Making direct contact with the user while it's heating up its beak results in a burn.
beak-blast.short_effect: Inflicts a burn on any Pokémon that makes contact before the attack.

clanging-scales.name: clanging-scales
clanging-scales.flavor_text: The user rubs the scales on its entire body and makes a huge noise to attack opposing Pokémon. The user's Defense stat is lowered after the attack.
clanging-scales.short_effect: Lowers the user's Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.

dragon-hammer.name: dragon-hammer
dragon-hammer.flavor_text: The user wields its body like a hammer to attack the target and inflict damage.
dragon-hammer.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

brutal-swing.name: brutal-swing
brutal-swing.flavor_text: The user swings its body around violently to inflict damage on everything in its vicinity.
brutal-swing.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

aurora-veil.name: aurora-veil
aurora-veil.flavor_text: This move reduces damage from physical and special moves for five turns. This can be used only when it is snowing.
aurora-veil.short_effect: Reduces damage five turns, but must be used during hail.

pulverizing-pancake.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

extreme-evoboost.short_effect: Raises all of the user's stats by two stages.

genesis-supernova.name: genesis-supernova
genesis-supernova.flavor_text: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
genesis-supernova.short_effect: Changes the terrain to Psychic Terrain after inflicting damage.

shell-trap.flavor_text: The user sets a shell trap. If the user is hit by a physical move, the trap will explode and inflict damage on opposing Pokémon.
shell-trap.short_effect: Only inflicts damage if the user was hit by a physical move this turn.

fleur-cannon.name: fleur-cannon
fleur-cannon.flavor_text: The user unleashes a strong beam. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat.
fleur-cannon.short_effect: Lowers the user's Special Attack by two stages after inflicting damage.

psychic-fangs.name: psychic-fangs
psychic-fangs.flavor_text: The user attacks by biting the target with its psychic capabilities. This move can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

stomping-tantrum.name: stomping-tantrum
stomping-tantrum.flavor_text: Driven by frustration, the user attacks the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's previous move failed.
stomping-tantrum.short_effect: Has double power if the user's last move failed.

shadow-bone.name: shadow-bone
shadow-bone.flavor_text: The user attacks by beating the target with a bone that contains a spirit. This may also lower the target’s Defense stat.
shadow-bone.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's Defense by one stage.

accelerock.name: accelerock

accelerock.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

liquidation.name: liquidation
liquidation.flavor_text: The user slams into the target using a full-force blast of water. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.
liquidation.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to lower the target's Defense by one stage.

prismatic-laser.flavor_text: The user shoots powerful lasers using the power of a prism. The user can't move on the next turn.
prismatic-laser.short_effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

spectral-thief.name: spectral-thief
spectral-thief.flavor_text: The user hides in the target’s shadow, steals the target’s stat boosts, and then attacks.
spectral-thief.short_effect: Steals the target's stat increases, then inflicts damage.

sunsteel-strike.flavor_text: The user slams into the target with the force of a meteor. This move can be used on the target regardless of its Ability.

moongeist-beam.name: moongeist-beam
