raging-fury.flavor_text: The user rampages around spewing flames for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.

wave-crash.name: wave-crash
wave-crash.flavor_text: The user shrouds itself in water and slams into the target with its whole body to inflict damage. This also damages the user quite a lot.

chloroblast.name: chloroblast
chloroblast.flavor_text: The user launches its amassed chlorophyll to inflict damage on the target. This also damages the user.

mountain-gale.name: mountain-gale
mountain-gale.flavor_text: The user hurls giant chunks of ice at the target to inflict damage. This may also make the target flinch.

victory-dance.name: victory-dance
victory-dance.flavor_text: The user performs an intense dance to usher in victory, boosting its Attack, Defense, and Speed stats.

headlong-rush.name: headlong-rush
headlong-rush.flavor_text: The user smashes into the target in a full-body tackle. This also lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats.

barb-barrage.name: barb-barrage
barb-barrage.flavor_text: The user launches countless toxic barbs to inflict damage. This may also poison the target. This move’s power is doubled if the target is already poisoned.

esper-wing.name: esper-wing
esper-wing.flavor_text: The user slashes the target with aura-enriched wings. This also boosts the user's Speed stat. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

bitter-malice.name: bitter-malice
bitter-malice.flavor_text: The user attacks the target with spine-chilling resentment. This also lowers the target’s Attack stat.

shelter.name: shelter
shelter.flavor_text: The user makes its skin as hard as an iron shield, sharply boosting its Defense stat.

triple-arrows.name: triple-arrows
triple-arrows.flavor_text: The user kicks, then fires three arrows. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit and may also lower the target’s Defense stat or make it flinch.

infernal-parade.name: infernal-parade
infernal-parade.flavor_text: The user attacks with myriad fireballs. This may also leave the target with a burn. This move's power is doubled if the target has a status condition.

ceaseless-edge.name: ceaseless-edge
ceaseless-edge.flavor_text: The user slashes its shell blade at the target. Shell splinters left behind by this attack remain scattered under the target as spikes.

bleakwind-storm.name: bleakwind-storm
bleakwind-storm.flavor_text: The user attacks with savagely cold winds that cause both body and spirit to tremble. This may also lower the Speed stats of opposing Pokémon.

wildbolt-storm.name: wildbolt-storm
wildbolt-storm.flavor_text: The user summons a thunderous tempest and savagely attacks with lightning and wind. This may also leave opposing Pokémon with paralysis.

sandsear-storm.name: sandsear-storm
sandsear-storm.flavor_text: The user attacks by wrapping opposing Pokémon in fierce winds and searingly hot sand. This may also leave them with a burn.

lunar-blessing.name: lunar-blessing
lunar-blessing.flavor_text: The user receives a blessing from the crescent moon, restoring HP and curing status conditions for itself and its ally Pokémon currently in the battle.

take-heart.name: take-heart
take-heart.flavor_text: The user lifts its spirits, curing its own status conditions and boosting its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

tera-blast.name: tera-blast
tera-blast.flavor_text: If the user has Terastallized, it unleashes energy of its Tera Type. This move inflicts damage using the Attack or Sp. Atk stat—whichever is higher for the user.

silk-trap.name: silk-trap
silk-trap.flavor_text: The user spins a silken trap, protecting itself from damage while lowering the Speed stat of any attacker that makes direct contact.

axe-kick.name: axe-kick
axe-kick.flavor_text: The user attacks by kicking up into the air and slamming its heel down upon the target. This may also confuse the target. If it misses, the user takes damage instead.

last-respects.name: last-respects
last-respects.flavor_text: The user attacks to avenge its allies. The more defeated allies there are in the user's party, the greater the move's power.

lumina-crash.name: lumina-crash
lumina-crash.flavor_text: The user attacks by unleashing a peculiar light that even affects the mind. This also harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

order-up.name: order-up
order-up.flavor_text: The user attacks with elegant poise. If the user has a Tatsugiri in its mouth, this move boosts one of the user's stats based on the Tatsugiri's form.

jet-punch.name: jet-punch
jet-punch.flavor_text: The user summons a torrent around its fist and punches at blinding speed. This move always goes first.

spicy-extract.name: spicy-extract
spicy-extract.flavor_text: The user emits an incredibly spicy extract, sharply boosting the target's Attack stat and harshly lowering the target's Defense stat.

spin-out.name: spin-out
spin-out.flavor_text: The user spins furiously by straining its legs, inflicting damage on the target. This also harshly lowers the user's Speed stat.

population-bomb.name: population-bomb
population-bomb.flavor_text: The user’s fellows gather in droves to perform a combo attack that hits the target one to ten times in a row.

ice-spinner.name: ice-spinner
ice-spinner.flavor_text: The user covers its feet in thin ice and twirls around, slamming into the target. This move's spinning motion also destroys the terrain.

glaive-rush.name: glaive-rush
glaive-rush.flavor_text: The user throws its entire body into a reckless charge. After this move is used, attacks on the user cannot miss and will inflict double damage until the user’s next turn.

revival-blessing.name: revival-blessing
revival-blessing.flavor_text: The user bestows a loving blessing, reviving a party Pokémon that has fainted and restoring half that Pokémon's max HP.

salt-cure.name: salt-cure
salt-cure.flavor_text: The user salt cures the target, inflicting damage every turn. Steel and Water types are more strongly affected by this move.

triple-dive.name: triple-dive
triple-dive.flavor_text: The user performs a perfectly timed triple dive, hitting the target with splashes of water three times in a row.

mortal-spin.name: mortal-spin
mortal-spin.flavor_text: The user performs a spin attack that can also eliminate the effects of such moves as Bind, Wrap, and Leech Seed. This also poisons opposing Pokémon.

doodle.name: doodle
doodle.flavor_text: The user captures the very essence of the target in a sketch. This changes the Abilities of the user and its ally Pokémon to that of the target.

fillet-away.name: fillet-away
fillet-away.flavor_text: The user sharply boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats by using its own HP.

kowtow-cleave.name: kowtow-cleave
kowtow-cleave.flavor_text: The user slashes at the target after kowtowing to make the target let down its guard. This attack never misses.

flower-trick.name: flower-trick
flower-trick.flavor_text: The user throws a rigged bouquet of flowers at the target. This attack never misses and always lands a critical hit.

torch-song.name: torch-song
torch-song.flavor_text: The user blows out raging flames as if singing a song, scorching the target. This also boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

aqua-step.name: aqua-step
aqua-step.flavor_text: The user toys with the target and attacks it using light and fluid dance steps. This also boosts the user's Speed stat.

raging-bull.name: raging-bull
raging-bull.flavor_text: The user performs a tackle like a raging bull. This move's type depends on the user's form. It can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

make-it-rain.name: make-it-rain
make-it-rain.flavor_text: The user attacks by throwing out a mass of coins. This also lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat. Money is earned after the battle.

psyblade.name: psyblade
psyblade.flavor_text: The user rends the target with an ethereal blade. This move's power is boosted by 50 percent if the user is on Electric Terrain.

hydro-steam.name: hydro-steam
hydro-steam.flavor_text: The user blasts the target with boiling-hot water. This move's power is not lowered in harsh sunlight but rather boosted by 50 percent.

ruination.name: ruination
ruination.flavor_text: The user summons a ruinous disaster. This cuts the target’s HP in half.

collision-course.name: collision-course
collision-course.flavor_text: The user transforms and crashes to the ground, causing a massive prehistoric explosion. This move's power is boosted more than usual if it’s a supereffective hit.

electro-drift.name: electro-drift
electro-drift.flavor_text: The user races forward at ultrafast speeds, piercing its target with futuristic electricity. This move's power is boosted more than usual if it's a supereffective hit.

shed-tail.name: shed-tail
shed-tail.flavor_text: The user creates a substitute for itself using its own HP before switching places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

tidy-up.name: tidy-up
tidy-up.flavor_text: The user tidies up and removes the effects of Spikes, Stealth Rock, Sticky Web, Toxic Spikes, and Substitute. This also boosts the user’s Attack and Speed stats.

snowscape.name: snowscape
snowscape.flavor_text: The user summons a snowstorm lasting five turns. This boosts the Defense stats of Ice types.

pounce.name: pounce
pounce.flavor_text: The user attacks by pouncing on the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

trailblaze.name: trailblaze
trailblaze.flavor_text: The user attacks suddenly as if leaping out from tall grass. The user's nimble footwork boosts its Speed stat.

chilling-water.name: chilling-water
chilling-water.flavor_text: The user attacks the target by showering it with water that's so cold it saps the target's power. This also lowers the target's Attack stat.

hyper-drill.name: hyper-drill
hyper-drill.flavor_text: The user spins the pointed part of its body at high speed to pierce the target. This attack can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect.

twin-beam.name: twin-beam
twin-beam.flavor_text: The user shoots mystical beams from its eyes to inflict damage. The target is hit twice in a row.

rage-fist.name: rage-fist
rage-fist.flavor_text: The user converts its rage into energy to attack. The more times the user has been hit by attacks, the greater the move's power.

armor-cannon.name: armor-cannon
armor-cannon.flavor_text: The user shoots its own armor out as blazing projectiles. This also lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats.

bitter-blade.name: bitter-blade
bitter-blade.flavor_text: The user focuses its bitter feelings toward the world of the living into a slashing attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.

double-shock.name: double-shock
double-shock.flavor_text: The user discharges all the electricity from its body to perform a high-damage attack. After using this move, the user will no longer be Electric type.

gigaton-hammer.name: gigaton-hammer
gigaton-hammer.flavor_text: The user swings its whole body around to attack with its huge hammer. This move can't be used twice in a row.

comeuppance.name: comeuppance
comeuppance.flavor_text: The user retaliates with much greater force against the opponent that last inflicted damage on it.

aqua-cutter.name: aqua-cutter
aqua-cutter.flavor_text: The user expels pressurized water to cut at the target like a blade. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

blood-moon.name: blood-moon
blood-moon.flavor_text: The user unleashes the full brunt of its spirit from a full moon that shines as red as blood. This move can't be used twice in a row.

matcha-gotcha.name: matcha-gotcha
matcha-gotcha.flavor_text: The user fires a blast of tea that it mixed. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

syrup-bomb.name: syrup-bomb
syrup-bomb.flavor_text: The user sets off an explosion of sticky candy syrup, which coats the target and causes the target's Speed stat to drop each turn for three turns.

ivy-cudgel.name: ivy-cudgel
ivy-cudgel.flavor_text: The user strikes with an ivy-wrapped cudgel. This move's type changes depending on the mask worn by the user, and it has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

electro-shot.name: electro-shot
electro-shot.flavor_text: The user gathers electricity on the first turn, boosting its Sp. Atk stat, then fires a high-voltage shot on the next turn. The shot will be fired immediately in rain.

tera-starstorm.name: tera-starstorm
tera-starstorm.flavor_text: With the power of its crystals, the user bombards and eliminates the target. When used by Terapagos in its Stellar Form, this move damages all opposing Pokémon.

fickle-beam.name: fickle-beam
fickle-beam.flavor_text: The user shoots a beam of light to inflict damage. Sometimes all the user's heads shoot beams in unison, doubling the move's power.

burning-bulwark.name: burning-bulwark
burning-bulwark.flavor_text: The user's intensely hot fur protects it from attacks and also burns any attacker that makes direct contact with it.

thunderclap.name: thunderclap
thunderclap.flavor_text: This move enables the user to attack first with a jolt of electricity. This move fails if the target is not readying an attack.

mighty-cleave.name: mighty-cleave
mighty-cleave.flavor_text: The user wields the light that has accumulated atop its head to cleave the target. This move hits even if the target protects itself.

tachyon-cutter.name: tachyon-cutter
tachyon-cutter.flavor_text: The user attacks by launching particle blades at the target twice in a row. This attack never misses.

hard-press.name: hard-press
hard-press.flavor_text: The target is crushed with an arm, a claw, or the like to inflict damage. The more HP the target has left, the greater the move's power.

dragon-cheer.name: dragon-cheer
dragon-cheer.flavor_text: The user raises its allies’ morale with a draconic cry so that their future attacks have a heightened chance of landing critical hits. This rouses Dragon types more.

alluring-voice.name: alluring-voice
alluring-voice.flavor_text: The user attacks the target using its angelic voice. This also confuses the target if its stats have been boosted during the turn.

temper-flare.name: temper-flare
temper-flare.flavor_text: Spurred by desperation, the user attacks the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's previous move failed.

supercell-slam.name: supercell-slam
supercell-slam.flavor_text: The user electrifies its body and drops onto the target to inflict damage. If this move misses, the user takes damage instead.

psychic-noise.name: psychic-noise
psychic-noise.flavor_text: The user attacks the target with unpleasant sound waves. For two turns, the target is prevented from recovering HP through moves, Abilities, or held items.

upper-hand.name: upper-hand
upper-hand.flavor_text: The user reacts to the target's movement and strikes with the heel of its palm, making the target flinch. This move fails if the target is not readying a priority move.

malignant-chain.name: malignant-chain
malignant-chain.flavor_text: The user pours toxins into the target by wrapping them in a toxic, corrosive chain. This may also leave the target badly poisoned.

shadow-rush.name: shadow-rush
shadow-rush.short_effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit in Hyper Mode.

shadow-blast.name: shadow-blast
shadow-blast.short_effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

shadow-blitz.name: shadow-blitz
shadow-blitz.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

shadow-bolt.name: shadow-bolt
shadow-bolt.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to paralyze the target.

shadow-break.name: shadow-break
shadow-break.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

shadow-chill.name: shadow-chill
shadow-chill.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to freeze the target.

shadow-end.name: shadow-end
shadow-end.short_effect: User receives 1/2 its HP in recoil.

shadow-fire.name: shadow-fire
shadow-fire.short_effect: Has a $effect_chance% chance to burn the target.

shadow-rave.name: shadow-rave
shadow-rave.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

shadow-storm.name: shadow-storm
shadow-storm.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

shadow-wave.name: shadow-wave
shadow-wave.short_effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

shadow-down.name: shadow-down
shadow-down.short_effect: Lowers the target's Defense by two stages.

shadow-half.name: shadow-half
shadow-half.short_effect: Halves HP of all Pokémon on the field.  Must recharge

shadow-hold.name: shadow-hold
shadow-hold.short_effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle.

shadow-mist.name: shadow-mist
shadow-mist.short_effect: Lowers the target's evasion by two stages.

shadow-shed.name: shadow-shed
shadow-shed.short_effect: Removes Light Screen, Reflect, and Safeguard.

shadow-sky.name: shadow-sky
shadow-sky.short_effect: Changes the weather to Shadow Sky for five turns.
